sentences.text: Frameworks are persuasion skeletons — proven orders in which to say things:
PAS — Problem, Agitate, Solution: name their pain, twist it (what it costs them daily), then present the way out.
The workhorse for emails and ads
AIDA — Attention, Interest, Desire, Action: hook them, hold them with relevance, build want with benefits and proof, tell them exactly what to do.
BAB — Before, After, Bridge: paint life now, paint life after, position your product as the bridge.
